ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., Global, Regional) */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., country, region, global) */,
  "parent_location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent location */,
  "geo_code" TEXT /* Geographical code for the location (e.g., ISO 3166-1 alpha-3) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the health statistics were recorded */,
  "period" TEXT /* Time period represented by the year */,
  "fiscal_year" INTEGER /* Fiscal year corresponding to the calendar year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Description of the age group (e.g., 0-6 days) */,
  "age_group_range" TEXT /* Age range represented by the age group (e.g., 0-6 days) */,
  "age_group_type" TEXT /* Type of age group (e.g., continuous, categorical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sexes" (
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sex classification */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the individuals (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "sex_description" TEXT /* Description of the sex classification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "causes" (
  "cause_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cause */,
  "cause_name" TEXT /* Name of the cause (e.g., Diabetes mellitus) */,
  "cause_description" TEXT /* Description of the cause */,
  "cause_category" TEXT /* Category of the cause (e.g., Infectious diseases) */,
  "cause_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the cause (e.g., Bacterial infections) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cause_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measures" (
  "measure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measure */,
  "measure_name" TEXT /* Name of the measure (e.g., Prevalent cases per 100,000) */,
  "measure_description" TEXT /* Description of the measure */,
  "measure_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the measure (e.g., per 100,000) */,
  "measure_type" TEXT /* Type of measure (e.g., rate-based, count-based) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location of the statistic */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year of the statistic */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group of the statistic */,
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sex of the statistic */,
  "cause_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cause of death or injury */,
  "measure_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measure of the statistic */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the statistic */,
  "lower_bound" REAL /* Lower bound of the statistic's estimate */,
  "upper_bound" REAL /* Upper bound of the statistic's estimate */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the health statistics data */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the health statistics data */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the estimate */,
  "standard_error" REAL /* Standard error of the estimate */,
  "data_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_statistics_sex_id FOREIGN KEY ("sex_id") REFERENCES sexes ("sex_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_statistics_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_statistics_measure_id FOREIGN KEY ("measure_id") REFERENCES measures ("measure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_statistics_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_statistics_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_statistics_cause_id FOREIGN KEY ("cause_id") REFERENCES causes ("cause_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization or affiliation of the user */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise of the user */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the statistic used in the report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., mortality trends, disease prevalence) */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_id") REFERENCES health_statistics ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collab_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "initiator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the collaboration */,
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who was invited to collaborate */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the collaboration */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the collaboration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the collaboration (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "collaboration_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the collaboration */,
  "collaboration_objective" TEXT /* Objective of the collaboration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collab_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_initiator_id FOREIGN KEY ("initiator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_collaborator_id FOREIGN KEY ("collaborator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "viz_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the statistic used in the visualization */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the visualization */,
  "viz_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., chart, map) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the visualization was created */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to access the visualization */,
  "visualization_title" TEXT /* Title of the visualization */,
  "visualization_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the visualization */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., chart, map) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("viz_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_id") REFERENCES health_statistics ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
